walnut-sauce-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de salsa de nueces fácil

instructions: Toss nuts with your hand and have them slightly into a frying pan, with soft fire so they don't get burned. Reserve.

En este momento, agrega la cucharada de harina y remueve hasta formar lo que en el mundo de la cocina se conoce como un roux.

watermelon-gazpacho-with-feta-crema.name: Watermelon Gazpacho With Feta Crema

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

ingredients.prep: rind removed, cut into  0.5" pieces (about 2 cups)

instructions: Purée watermelon, tomato, cucumber, jalapeño, oil, and vinegar in a blender until smooth.
Transfer gazpacho to a large bowl; season with kosher salt and pepper. Cover and chill at least 1 hour before serving.
DO AHEAD: Gazpacho can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

Preheat oven to 350°. Toast almonds on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing occasionally, until golden brown, about 8–10 minutes. (Alternatively, you can do this step in a dry small skillet over medium heat.) Let almonds cool, then coarsely chop.
Mash feta into sour cream in a small bowl until mostly smooth, then whisk in milk.

Divide watermelon and cucumber among bowls and pour gazpacho over. Top with crema and almonds, drizzle with oil, and season with sea salt and pepper.
DO AHEAD: Crema can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

wazzu-tailgate-chili.name: Wazzu Tailgate Chili
instructions: Cook and stir ground beef and pork in a large skillet over medium-high heat until crumbly, evenly browned, and no longer pink. Drain and discard excess grease.
Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add ¾ onion, bell pepper, jalapeños, habanero, and garlic; cook and stir until onion softened and turned translucent, about 5 minutes.

Stir beef-pork mixture, chili beans, diced tomatoes, beer, tomato sauce, water, tomato paste, and green onion into onion mixture; sprinkle with cornmeal. Season with chili powder, cumin, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and cayenne pepper.
Bring chili to a simmer over medium heat, then reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for at least 2 hours, stirring occasionally. Refrigerate for 8 hours to overnight.
Reheat chili over medium heat until it begins to simmer. Top servings with cheese and remaining ¼ onion.

west-coast-trail-cookies.name: West Coast Trail Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.
Whisk together all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, flax seed meal, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.

Beat together butter, brown sugar, and white sugar in a large bowl until smooth and creamy; Stir in eggs and vanilla. Stir flour mixture into creamed butter mixture until dough is just combined. Fold oats, chocolate chips, cranberries, coconut, and pumpkin seeds into dough just until evenly combined.
Shape dough into 1 1/2-inch balls or drop by heaping tablespoonfuls onto the prepared baking sheets about 2 inches apart; press to flatten slightly.
Bake cookies in the preheated oven until lightly golden at the edges, about 12 minutes. Cool on the baking sheet for 10 minutes; transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.

whiskey-and-rye-chocolate-chip-cookies.name: Whiskey And Rye Chocolate Chip Cookies

ingredients.item: Find chocolate wafers (do not use chocolate wafer cookies) at specialty food stores

instructions: Pulse ¾ cup chocolate wafers in a food processor until pea-sized pieces form. Whisk all-purpose flour, rye flour, baking soda, and kosher salt in a medium bowl.

Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat butter, brown sugar, and granulated sugar in a large bowl, scraping down sides of bowl as needed, until light and fluffy, 3–4 minutes. Add egg, vanilla, and bourbon and beat until fully incorporated, about 1 minute. Reduce speed to low and slowly add dry ingredients, mixing just to blend. Fold in chopped chocolate and remaining chocolate wafers.
Portion dough into 16 balls (about ¼ cup each) and transfer to a rimmed sheet sheet as you go. Wrap tightly with plastic wrap and chill at least 3 hours or up to 1 day.
Position rack in middle of oven and preheat to 350°. Scrape vanilla seeds into sea salt in a small bowl and mix to combine (save pod for another use).

Divide dough balls between 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing 3" apart. Flatten each ball to about ¾" thick and sprinkle with vanilla salt. Bake cookies, rotating sheets halfway through, until golden brown around the edges, 14–18 minutes (cookies will firm up as they cool). Let cool slightly on baking sheets, then transfer to wire racks and let cool completely.
Do Ahead: Cookies can be made 1 day ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

white-icing-argiro.name: White Icing
instructions: We'll use ben marie. In the bowl of the ben marie, add all the ingredients we will need in our recipe for white glaze.
Beat the injectors in the bowl at a high speed for 7′′.
The mixture will take its tumor three times.
It'll swell a lot, polish and become elastic and tight.
We don't stop hitting the mixer on the ben marie until the mixture turns shiny and dense as whipped cream.
If you want to color it with a pastry color, put it in a pastry frame in the refrigerator until we use it.
This glaze is ideal for garnishing cakes, trunks, lemon pie, cheesecake lemon or to fill cake. It is solid glaze very fluffy and delicious.

wholegrain-mustard-dressing.name: Wholegrain Mustard Dressing
instructions: Whisk all ingredients in a small bowl or shake, covered, in a jar.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

wild-boar-steaks-with-mountain-salad-tel.name: Wild Boar Steaks With Mountain Salad
wild-boar-steaks-with-mountain-salad-tel.original_name: Bifes de javali com salada à montanheira
instructions: Light a frying pan with butter and crushed garlic. Add the boar steaks and let it blush on both sides. Add the mustard, season with salt and pepper and wrap until it is well connected.

Peel and pinch the onion; wash and cut the tomatoes in cubes; wash and clean the pepper and cucumber from seeds and cut them also into cubes. Place everything in a bowl, season with the olive oil, oregano, salt and pepper and wrap it carefully.
Transfira os bifes de javali para uma travessa, regue com o molho e decore com raminhos de salsa. Sirva acompanhados com a salada montanheira.

wild-salmon-crudo.name: Wild Salmon Crudo

ingredients.item: Coarse sea salt (such as maldon) and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Place salmon on a work surface. Using a sharp, long-bladed knife, cut salmon against the grain into very thin slices. Divide slices evenly among salad plates, arranging flat so they don't overlap. Cover salmon with plastic wrap. Working with one plate at a time, use the flat bottom of a metal 1-cup measuring cup to press down on plastic until salmon spreads out and covers the entire surface of the plate; repeat with remaining plates. Stack plates and chill until cold.

Place arugula in a large bowl; drizzle with lemon juice and 3 Tbsp. oil and toss to coat. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Remove plastic wrap from salmon. Drizzle salmon with remaining 1 Tbsp. oil and season with salt and pepper. Scatter arugula over and serve with lemon wedges alongside for squeezing over.

wind-empanadas-an-ecuadorian-recipe-come.name: Wind Empanadas, An Ecuadorian Recipe
wind-empanadas-an-ecuadorian-recipe-come.original_name: Empanadas de viento, una receta ecuatoriana

ingredients.item: 200 gr de quesillo o mozzarella desmenuzado

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta mezclando el harina de trigo junto al polvo de hornear. Luego, con la ayuda de un colador la vamos a tamizar para quitar los grumos.
Toma la mantequilla y la vas a batir hasta hacerla una pomada, es decir, blanquecina y suave.
In a bowl, you will add the flour and pint of salt and mix.
Make a place at the centre of the flour, and you'll add the butter. Mix up till everything's integrated.
Now, you'll put some water and mix up and get a consistent mass. Finish with your hands till it's smooth and nonsticky. If you notice she's missing some flour, add some more.
Make your dough a ball, cover it with a kitchen cloth and let it rest for 30 minutes.
After that time, you'll take your dough and completely stretch it. Then you'll cut discs of the same size. With the spare dough, put it back up and you finish cutting the necessary discs.
Take some cheese and put it in the middle of every disc with some onion.
Then, you'll close the empanada, press the edge with a fork and shape his tipples as a double wrapped. Do the same with the rest.
Warm up a frying pan with plenty of oil and you'll fry them till they're well golden. Put them on an absorbing paper to remove the oil surplus.
He ends up chewing his sugar through all his empanadas.
Enjoy them!

with-yogurt-and-mango-teleculinaria.name: With Yogurt And Mango
instructions: Put the raspberries, blackberries and blueberries in a bowl. Add the orange scrape, sugar and basil. Mix well, cover with adhesive film and let macerate for about 1 hour to 2 hours. In the end, reject the basil.
Peel your sleeve and remove your lump. Crush the pulp into a blender until it's even.

In individual bowls, place half the yogurt, followed by the mango puree. Cover with the rest of the yogurt and lead to cold until served. At that time, distribute the fruit macerated on the surface of the candy and serve.
